purpose: Standalone Pi web/code search and research helpers with provider fallback, page extraction, and research checkpointing.

provides.name: web_search
provides.description: Search the web for information. Supports single query or up to five parallel queries. Multi-provider cascade: Tavily → Exa → Brave → SerpAPI; unconfigured providers are skipped.

queries.description: Multiple queries to search in parallel, max 5.

max_results.description: Max results per query, default 5, max 10.

search_depth.description: basic or advanced; advanced is Tavily-specific.

provider.description: Force one provider; omit for automatic cascade.

provides.name: polite_search
provides.description: Rate-limited synthesized search for extended research. Cascade: Perplexity → Exa answer → OpenRouter → local greedy_search fallback. Returns cited prose when a provider is available.

depth.description: Controls citation detail and follow-up suggestions.

provides.name: web_extract
provides.description: Extract clean markdown from a web page or PDF URL using Readability/PDF extraction with Jina fallback for low-quality pages.

provides.name: fetch_content
provides.description: Advanced content extraction with method, fallback, quality, and metadata details for a URL or PDF.

force_jina.description: Force Jina extraction even when primary extraction succeeds.

provides.name: code_search
provides.description: Search code examples, API references, official docs, GitHub examples, and debugging sources. Uses Exa when EXA_API_KEY is configured.

query.description: Programming question, API, library, or debugging topic.

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens of source context; default 5000.

provides.name: research_checkpoint
provides.description: Evaluate deep-research progress after each search round and return a CONTINUE or PROCEED verdict.

provides.name: deep_research
provides.description: Return the deep-research workflow prompt for a topic. Caller agents should execute the workflow with web_search, polite_search, web_extract/fetch_content, code_search, and research_checkpoint provides.
